kept.text:
海外でバズったTikTok運用をClaude Codeで自動化した事例が面白い。

Claude × MakeUGC × Postizを使えば、TikTokのスライド投稿をほぼ自動化できる。

流れはこんな感じ。

・TikTokで伸びているスライド投稿を探す
・SnapTikで保存
・Claude Opus 4.7に分析させる
・バズった理由、Hook、構成を抽出
・Pinterestで画像素材を集める
・MakeUGCでスライドを一括生成
・Postiz Agent CLIで投稿予約
・最後だけTikTokアプリから手動投稿

ポイントは、いきなりオリジナルを作らないこと。

まずは伸びている型を見つけて、

・最初の1枚目のHook
・なぜ刺さったのか
・どんな感情を動かしているのか
・どの構成なら再現できるのか

をClaudeに分解させる。

その後、MakeUGCで画像とテキストを組み合わせて、量産できるテンプレートに落とし込む。

特に面白いのは、最後の投稿だけは完全自動にしない点。

APIで直接投稿すると、TikTok側に機械的な投稿と見なされるリスクがあるため、

・Postizで下書き化
・通知を受け取る
・スマホでTikTokを開く
・人間が最後に投稿ボタンを押す

というハイブリッド運用にしている。

AI活用の本質は、全部を自動化することではなく、
「人間がやるべき最後の1%」以外をどこまで仕組み化できるか。

コンテンツ制作は、センス勝負からシステム勝負に変わりつつある。

kept.text:
And the most frustrating thing is every solid husband in America knows this.

WE ALL know without a modicum of doubt that if we don’t let her plan and Pinterest and ask us a million questions about the new kitchen plan or bathroom renovation or deck… if we try to do it with zero input it will be ugly and marginally functional.

But we also known that at some point you gotta tell her to stop and you have to drive to Home Depot and buy all the materials yourself and just start dropping nails.

And we all know she will get angry and upset and claim we can’t afford it, claim we have to pay the other bills first, say the paint isn’t the shade she wanted, she will ask some other man to come give her a second opinion… etc

And when you do drop the first nails she will be worried about the noise, the neighbors, the sawdust, etc… and try to pause the process.

But keep driving those nails and two or three days in and you’ll both be fine.

THIS is the moment. The action phase. Both sides are dreading the most.

And you will be very tempted to throw your hands up and return everything and just live with your old kitchen

But if you continue despite the protests she will be eternally grateful at the results. And you will be grateful it looks beautiful and everything is laid out properly.

WE HUSBANDS KNOW THIS

EVERY ONE of Trump’s cabinet members is married to a member of the opposite sex except Scott Bessent whose house is gorgeous.

THEY ALL KNOW THIS IS HOW IT WORKS 

And yet this is exactly where we are right now with shipbuilding. Stuck because nobody is willing to end all the meetings and drive to Home Depot with the GD credit card.

That’s exactly where we are with shipbuilding and it’s frustrating as heck.

profile_bio.description: CEO @gCaptain | US Merchant Marine | Ship Captain | Pentagon Press | Author: Fire on the Horizon | Shipbuilder | Blacklisted by Wikipedia | K5HIP 🇺🇸
